ノルウェー沖/ナルヴィク沖: Off the Coast of Norway / Narvik
深海棲艦によるノルウェー\n侵攻ヴェーザー演習作戦が\n開始された！欧州遠征部隊: The Abyssal Fleet has launched the invasion of Norway—Operation Weserübung! Crush it with the full might of the European Expeditionary Force!
北欧の戦略要衝、ナルヴィ\nク防衛作戦を実施する！同\n地に陸戦部隊と救援物資を: Commence the defense operation of Narvik, a key strategic point in Northern Europe! Land ground forces and relief supplies! Stop the enemy invasion!
敵決戦兵力がナルヴィク沖\nに集結中！艦隊決戦により\nこれを撃滅せよ！欧州遠征: Enemy main forces are gathering off the coast of Narvik! Engage them in a decisive fleet battle and annihilate them! European Expeditionary Fleet, sortie! Victory at dawn!
南沙諸島沖/仏印沖: Off the Spratly Islands / Off French Indochina
太平洋戦線で、敵機動部隊\n及び敵潜水艦部隊に攻勢の\n兆候が確認されている！\: Signs of enemy carrier and submarine activity have been detected on the Pacific front! Fleet in the Spratly area, remain on alert!
銚子沖/北海道沖/三陸沖太平洋: Off Chōshi / Off Hokkaido / Sanriku Pacific Waters
遂に深海機動部隊主力が\n我が本土方面に一大攻勢\nをかけてきた！全稼働艦\n隊: The main force of the Abyssal carrier fleet has finally launched a massive offensive toward our homeland! All active fleets, sortie and intercept the enemy!
ノルウェーを救援する！艦隊、前進せよ！: We will aid Norway! Fleet, advance!
ナルヴィクに突入する！警戒を厳に！:
Commence the thrust into Narvik!
Maintain utmost vigilance!
